Finding Summary: Synchronous payment status call has no explicit client timeout
Evidence Reviewed: Architecture diagram v1.4; code review; integration test report
Observed Gap: Client library uses platform default timeout and no cancellation token
Risk Statement: If the payment provider is slow, request threads can block, increasing tail latency and causing cascading failure under load.
Recommendation: Set explicit connect/read/overall timeout; add cancellation propagation; test slow dependency behavior.
Target State: All external calls have documented timeout budget aligned to SLO and verified by resilience test.

Finding Summary: PII appears in application error logs
Evidence Reviewed: Production log sample; DLP scan; support ticket INC-456
Observed Gap: Exception logging includes full request payload for failed profile updates
Risk Statement: Sensitive customer data may be exposed to support users and retained beyond privacy policy limits.
Recommendation: Mask request payloads; add structured safe logging; purge affected logs according to privacy/legal guidance; add logging tests.
Target State: Logs contain no sensitive payload fields and DLP scan passes.
Compensating Controls: Temporary restricted access to affected log workspace
